subject: Cannot connect Gmail integration
message: Hi, we've been trying to set up the Gmail integration for our support team but we keep getting an 'OAuth permission denied' error. We've tried disconnecting and reconnecting multiple times, and we've verified that our Gmail account has the correct permissions. This is blocking our entire team from being able to receive support emails. We really need this fixed ASAP as we're supposed to launch customer support tomorrow.
resolution_notes: User had not enabled the Gmail API in their Google Cloud Console. After enabling the API and re-authorizing, integration connected successfully. Added to FAQ section.
agent_response: Hi Jane, Thanks for reaching out! I can help you get that Gmail integration working. The 'OAuth permission denied' error usually happens when the Gmail API isn't enabled in your Google Cloud project. Here's what to do: 1) Go to console.cloud.google.com, 2) Find your project, 3) Search for 'Gmail API', 4) Click 'Enable', 5) Then try reconnecting in NovaDeskAI. Let me know if that works!

subject: Bot responses are completely wrong
message: Help! Your bot keeps telling customers we offer video editing services but we only do copywriting. Something's wrong with the training.

subject: Question about analytics dashboard filtering
message: Hi there! I'm trying to filter the analytics dashboard by specific agents and time periods, but I can't find where to do this. Could you point me in the right direction or let me know if this feature exists?
agent_response: Hi Sarah! Great question. You can filter the dashboard by clicking the 'Filters' button in the top right of the dashboard. You'll see options for date range, agent(s), channel, and more. Try that and let me know if you need help!

subject: Billing issue - charged twice this month
message: I noticed on my credit card statement that I was charged twice for my NovaDeskAI subscription this month. I have screenshots showing both charges on February 1st and February 15th. This is completely unacceptable and I need an immediate explanation and refund. I'm considering canceling if this isn't resolved today. Please contact me immediately at 555-0147.
agent_response: Hi David, I sincerely apologize for the double charge. I'm escalating this to our billing team immediately as this requires manual investigation. We'll review your account within the next 2 hours and reach out with a solution. Thank you for your patience.

subject: How to set up WhatsApp escalation?
message: Is there a way to automatically escalate WhatsApp messages to human agents? We want the bot to handle simple questions but escalate anything complex.
resolution_notes: Provided user with escalation threshold configuration steps. User successfully enabled confidence-based escalation at 65% threshold.
agent_response: Yes! In NovaBot settings, go to 'Escalation Rules'. You can set a confidence threshold (we recommend 65%) - any message the bot isn't confident about will auto-escalate to your team. You can also add keywords that trigger escalation.

subject: Feature request: Custom user roles
message: We have different team members with different responsibilities and would love to have custom user role templates so we don't have to manually set permissions for each person. Is this something you're planning to add?
resolution_notes: Custom roles already available on Scale plan. User doesn't have Scale plan yet, but informed of feature and pricing. User satisfied with information.
agent_response: Great suggestion, Robert! Actually, custom role templates are available now on our Scale plan. You can create roles like 'Team Lead', 'Agent', 'Billing Admin' with specific permissions. Would you like to learn more about Scale plan features?

subject: REST API authentication keeps timing out
message: We're building a custom integration using your REST API, but we keep getting 401 Unauthorized errors even though we've verified our API key is correct. We've tried rotating the key and using different authentication headers but nothing is working. Our development team is stuck on this and we have a deadline next week. Can someone from your technical team please reach out to help debug this?
agent_response: Hi Lisa, I'd be happy to help! A few quick things to check: 1) Make sure you're using 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' in the Authorization header, 2) Verify your API key hasn't expired, 3) Check that you're hitting the correct v1 endpoint. Can you share the exact error response you're getting?

subject: Can't find password reset option
message: Forgot my password and can't log in. Where's the reset button?
resolution_notes: Sent password reset link. User confirmed email received and able to log in again.
agent_response: No problem Tom! Click 'Forgot Password?' on the login page and enter your email. You'll get a reset link in your inbox in seconds. Check spam folder if you don't see it!

subject: URGENT: System completely down, cannot access any tickets
message: Our entire support operation is down. We can't access the NovaDeskAI platform at all - we're getting 503 errors when trying to log in. Our customers are piling up with no way to get support. This is a critical business impact. We need immediate assistance!

subject: Need help configuring canned responses for our team
message: We want to set up a library of pre-written responses for common questions our support team gets asked. We've already got some templates written out, and we'd like to know the best way to organize them and make them easy for agents to find. Can you walk us through the process or recommend a structure?
resolution_notes: Provided comprehensive guide on canned response organization. Recommended organizing by: 1) Product category, 2) Issue type, 3) Priority. User exported template and will implement.
agent_response: Great idea, Michael! Here's what I recommend: Organize by Product > Issue Type (like 'Billing', 'Technical', 'General'), then tag by priority/complexity. This makes it easy for agents to search. You can also mark favorites for your most-used ones. Want me to send you our template organization guide?

subject: HIPAA compliance - is this secure?
message: We work in healthcare and need HIPAA compliance. Does your platform support HIPAA? Need to know about encryption, audit logs, data residency.
agent_response: Hi Patricia! Great question. Scale plan includes HIPAA compliance with BAA available. We have end-to-end encryption, full audit logs, and data stored in US regions. This definitely requires Scale plan features. Our sales team can discuss details. Would you like an intro?

subject: How do I update my billing card?
message: I need to update the credit card on file for my NovaDeskAI subscription. Where can I do this in the settings?
resolution_notes: Provided billing settings navigation steps. User confirmed card updated successfully.
agent_response: Hi Kevin! Easy - go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. Click 'Update Card' and enter your new card info. It'll be active immediately for your next billing cycle.

subject: Bot is escalating ALL messages - need immediate fix
message: Something is very wrong with our NovaBot configuration. It's escalating literally every single customer message to our team instead of responding with answers. This is defeating the purpose of having a bot at all. We've already had over 50 escalations in the last 2 hours and our team is completely overwhelmed. We need to shut it off or get this fixed immediately. What's happening?
agent_response: Angela, I'm very sorry about this! This sounds like the escalation confidence threshold was set too high. Let me walk you through: 1) Go to NovaBot > Escalation Settings, 2) Check the confidence threshold - it should be 40-70%, 3) If it's at 95%+ that's your problem. Let me know what you see and I'll help adjust it.

subject: Does the Growth plan include Slack integration?
message: Checking if Slack alerts are included in Growth plan or if we need to upgrade to Scale.
resolution_notes: Confirmed Growth plan includes Slack integration. User satisfied with pricing and feature set.
agent_response: Good news! Slack is included in Growth plan. You get all the integrations (Gmail, Slack, Zapier) plus advanced NovaBot. You should be all set! 😊

subject: SLA breaches happening repeatedly - need investigation
message: Our team has missed the SLA on 6 tickets this week (all P2 priority, should be 4-hour response). Looking at the tickets, our team members said they never saw these come through to their queue. It seems like there's an issue with ticket routing or assignment. We need help understanding why these are falling through the cracks and how to prevent this from happening going forward.
agent_response: Hi Rachel, This is definitely something we need to investigate. Can you send me the ticket IDs that missed SLA? I'll review the routing rules and assignment logs to see if there's a pattern (availability settings, skill tags, round-robin settings, etc). This will help us identify the root cause.
